summary: A technical bug causing a full application crash.
game_context: The software became unresponsive during a combat action.
evidence: The game screen freezes
Screen cuts to black
Sarcastic tone
Scene: During the initial nautiloid combat after using Vicious Mockery.
Expression: None visible
Quote: And my game crashed. Dope.

summary: A self-admitted gap in basic mechanical knowledge despite high total playtime (2000 hours).
game_context: The player discovers that ritual spells like Longstrider do not consume spell slots outside of combat.
evidence: Cursor hovering repeatedly over 'Longstrider' and 'Ritual' tooltip
Delayed menu exit
Self-deprecating laughter
Disbelieving tone
Scene: Reviewing Bard level 2 spells and ritual mechanics on the Ravaged Beach.
Quote: Am I just a fucking idiot? Has everybody been using ritual spells and just never told me?
Quote: I really gotta start reading things, huh?

summary: A sharp difficulty spike coupled with self-admitted 'reckless' tactical play.
game_context: A difficult combat encounter where a single mistake could have ended the permanent-death Honor Mode run.
evidence: Multiple party members (Astarion, Shadowheart) in 'Downed' or 'Bleeding' states
Low health bars on remaining characters
Extensive blood pools on environmental terrain
Serious, reflective narration
Lowered vocal volume indicating tension
Scene: High-stakes combat encounter with gnolls on the Risen Road.
Quote: I had been having such good luck, but ending the battle with literally only one person still on their feet was a sobering experience.
Quote: I'd gotten a little reckless during this encounter with these gnolls because I had been having such good luck.

summary: The player realized a major quest line is permanently blocked due to the permadeath mechanic affecting an essential NPC.
game_context: Permanent NPC death in Honor Mode.
evidence: Checks Halsin's inventory for loot
Abrupt cut to black and white cinematic filter during realization
Shocked tone
Slower speech pattern
Disappointed delivery
Scene: The player discovers Halsin's dead body in the Shattered Sanctum after the Goblin Camp battle.
Quote: I have no way of fixing it. I... you can't revive him. And that means I'm also locked out of fixing the shadow-cursed lands.

summary: Difficulty spike in a high-stakes (Honor Mode) environment nearly ending the entire playthrough.
game_context: Surprise encounter with a legendary creature in the Underdark.
evidence: Party health bars at near-zero
Rapidly clicking through character turns
Bulette leaping away while party is critical
Lowered, tense vocal volume
Deep exhale
Scene: A high-stakes combat encounter against a Bulette in the Underdark where multiple party members are nearly downed.
Quote: If that thing had stuck around, I probably would have gotten wiped right here. That encouraged me to be a little more tactical.

summary: The player found the initial subclass unengaging in combat, affecting their enjoyment of the run despite tactical success.
game_context: Mechanical boredom with the College of Glamour subclass features.
evidence: Lingering on subclass descriptions
Navigating from College of Glamour back to character basics
Sigh of resignation
Somber tone
Scene: The character respec menu with Withers at the camp.
Expression: None visible
Quote: The run was going well, but I wasn't really having much fun. I decided that to give Bard a fair shot, I needed to try another subclass... just in case that was my issue.

summary: Expected game mechanics based on item naming do not align with actual stat outputs.
game_context: Misleading item nomenclature where the club provides 19 STR instead of the standard Giant-tier 21 STR.
evidence: Repeatedly hovering over the Strength stat (19)
Comparing the stat to the item name
Annoyed tone
Dismissive tone
Scene: Inspecting the character sheet and the 'Club of Hill Giant Strength' tooltip.
Expression: None visible
Quote: It's really annoying that... it doesn't give you Hill Giant strength, but whatever.

summary: Personal health issues (flu/cold) and a script recording failure disrupted the video production flow.
game_context: External technical error during recording and physical illness.
evidence: Large text block overlaying the screen
Blurred gameplay footage
Sluggish voice
Congested breathing/speech
Scene: A blurred background with a large text overlay explaining a recording and health issue.
Expression: None visible
Quote: somehow I messed up and didn't record the next few lines of the script... and I don't want to just record them now because I sound very sick.
Quote: it was a rough few weeks to say the least.

summary: Difficulty spike and high-damage enemy spells.
game_context: High-stakes boss fight in Honor Mode where a single bad turn could end the permanent-death run.
evidence: Multiple characters taking heavy poison damage from Cloudkill
Characters positioned in a dangerous cluster
Stressed tone
Quickened speech
Scene: Combat with Balthazar in the Gauntlet of Shar, where a Cloudkill spell nearly downs the party.
Quote: Balthazar scared the shit out of me. I really thought he might wipe us out. He got pretty damn close.

summary: Technical bug causing a boss to de-render during an active fight.
game_context: Technical glitch during a boss encounter.
evidence: Boss model (Grym) becomes invisible or de-renders
Player hovers cursor over empty space searching for the target
Raised voice
Panicked tone
Aggressive delivery
Scene: Combat with Grym in the Adamantine Forge; the boss visually disappears when the forge lever is toggled.
Quote: He just fucking disappeared when I hit the switch! Larian, for the love of all that is holy, fix your game please!

summary: Distrust of game engine stability based on prior 'lessons' or bugs.
game_context: Unreliable physics or collision detection on moving platforms.
evidence: Character stops moving and waits for the platform animation to fully settle
Annoyed tone
Skeptical delivery
Scene: Navigating the moving Traversal Gem platform in the Gauntlet of Shar.
Quote: I have learned my lesson in the Gauntlet of Shar. Do not ever trust this platform.
